# Recent Talks

## 2026

<div class="talk-card">

<div class="talk-conference">
11th Survival Analysis for Junior Researchers (SAfJR)
</div> 

Amsterdam, the Netherlands

<div class="talk-date">
25–27 March 2026
</div>

<div class="talk-authors">
<strong>A. Garcia-Fernández</strong>, D. Rizopoulos, J. Kooiman, P. Miranda-Afonso
</div>

<div class="talk-title">
"A New Strictly Proper Metric for Evaluating Dynamic Time-to-Event Predictions with Asymmetric Misclassification"
</div>

<div class="talk-badge talk-contributed">
Contributed Talk
</div>

</div>

## 2025

<div class="talk-card">

<div class="talk-conference">
XX Spanish Biometrics Conference (CEB)
</div>

Elche, Spain

<div class="talk-date">
16–19 September 2025
</div>

<div class="talk-authors">
<strong>A. Garcia-Fernández</strong>, D. Rizopoulos, G. Gómez Melis
</div>

<div class="talk-title">
"Optimizing dynamic predictions from joint models for multivariate longitudinal and time-to-event data via super learning approach"
</div>

<div class="talk-badge talk-contributed">
Contributed Talk
</div>

<div class="talk-award">
🏆 Student Award
</div>

</div>

<div class="talk-card">

<div class="talk-conference">
XLI Spanish National Congress of Statistics and Operations Research (SEIO)
</div>

Lleida, Spain

<div class="talk-date">
10–13 June 2025
</div>

<div class="talk-authors">
<strong>A. Garcia-Fernández</strong>, K. Langohr, M. Besalú, G. Gómez Melis
</div>

<div class="talk-title">
"Goodness-of-fit methods for right-censored data: theory, implementation in R, and application in accelerated failure time models"
</div>

<div class="talk-badge talk-contributed">
Contributed Talk
</div>

</div>
